message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "risk_area": "legal",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Undefined requirements leading to disputes",
      "rationale": "The lack of clearly defined requirements may result in disagreements between the Developer and Company, leading to potential legal disputes.",
      "mitigation": "Establish a detailed requirements gathering process with clear documentation and approval stages.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "commercial",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Payment delays due to late delivery",
      "rationale": "If the Developer fails to deliver on time, it may lead to reduced payments and impact cash flow for the Developer.",
      "mitigation": "Implement a structured timeline with penalties for late delivery to incentivize timely completion.",
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "operational",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Failure of acceptance tests",
      "rationale": "If the software fails to meet acceptance criteria, it can delay project timelines and increase costs.",
      "mitigation": "Conduct thorough testing and quality assurance throughout the development process to identify issues early.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "enforcement",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Inadequate enforcement of contract terms",
      "rationale": "If either party fails to enforce the terms of the Phase Agreement, it may lead to unfulfilled obligations and potential losses.",
      "mitigation": "Regularly review contract compliance and establish a clear process for addressing breaches.",
      "confidence": 0.65
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "legal",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Intellectual property disputes",
      "rationale": "Custom software development may lead to disputes over ownership of intellectual property created during the project.",
      "mitigation": "Clearly define ownership rights and licensing terms in the Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.7
    }
  ]
}
